emails.subject: Re: Orwell & Lakeside - Enron IPP
emails.body: I'm a bad person. I forgot to tell you I sold CES 880 to 1000 day at the pool starting tomorrow on deal 217775 Also, I just sold CES 2500/day at CGLF Mainline starting the 16th-31st, deal 217854. This gas is for Atistech. I assume we schedule that. Joan Veselack@ENRON 03/14/2000 12:58 PM

emails.subject: Re: Orwell & Lakeside - Enron IPP
emails.body: Per our phone call... I changed the deal ticket to match reality of 1174/day. Robert will path as a buy/sell in unify. Chris Germany@ECT 03/14/2000 01:45 PM
